name: skill-mania
description: Portable Agent Skills collection for Codex, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot.

interface.shortDescription: Portable reusable workflows for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: A portable Agent Skills collection for Codex, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and compatible clients, covering focused local commits, concise responses, minimal implementation, software development, testing, visual QA, platform engineering, DevOps, design, design review, Godot development, gameplay consulting, architecture, security, SEO/GEO, Austrian/Vienna legal issue spotting, writing, editing, publishing review, skill curation, and agent context maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Use the laziest correct implementation that avoids unnecessary code.
Create DESIGN.md, plan/build UI, capture browser evidence, and run senior design review gates.
Implement, test, make a focused commit, review, curate skills, or maintain context with the matching Skill Mania role.
